teams.name: Billing
teams.description: Invoices, charges, refunds, payment methods, and subscription plans.

teams.name: Account Access
teams.description: Signing in and credentials: passwords, password resets, SSO, two-factor, locked accounts.

teams.name: Technical Support
teams.description: Bugs, errors, crashes, and product features not working as expected.

teams.name: Sales
teams.description: Plans, pricing, quotes, demos, trials, and purchasing.

teams.name: Trust & Safety
teams.description: Abuse, fraud, spam, harassment, impersonation, and account-security concerns.

teams.name: Data Privacy
teams.description: Personal-data requests and data handling: export, retention, and what data is stored or shared.
